initiatives.name: Western Mass SURJ
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in Western Massachusetts. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through racial justice education and accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations.

initiatives.name: Lupinewood
initiatives.description: Building a place for community organizing and radical art in Greenfield.

initiatives.name: Finca Luna Buho
initiatives.description: Finca Luna Búho is a carespace & farm nurturing ecologies of care in the norhtern Berkshires.

initiatives.name: Harm Reduction Hedgehogs 413
initiatives.description: HRH413 is located in Western MA and is dedicated to developing harm reduction talent in the region and nationally via collaboration and #emergentstrategy.
